title: Bigbear.ai director Dorothy Hayes sells $61,575 in company stock
text: BigBear.ai director Dorothy Hayes executed an insider stock sale, disposing of 15,000 shares for $61,575. The sale took place on May 8, 2026 at $4.11 per share, occurring immediately after the company's Q1 2026 earnings announcement on May 5. This insider sale adds to a pattern of director sales at BigBear.ai, with 18 insider sales reported over the past 12 months and zero insider purchases, suggesting board members may view the stock as fully valued at current levels.
